content.claim: As of 2024, more than 1,200 of Hungary's 3,155 settlements (38%) have no public educational institution, raising territorial equity concerns within a context of 3.4% national population decline over the prior decade.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Describes current distribution but does not isolate causation between demographic decline and closure policy
Does not distinguish between never-established versus closed institutions
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
